title: cistanthe litoralis
intro: Cistanthe litoralis, also known as sea blusher or salt and pepper flower, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family that grows in coastal areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cistanthe litoralis has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
